original: blockHeader("Equipping the Hardlight Naga Suit...")+textify(a||(a=(0,i.Z)(["You put your naked [pc.legsNoun] inside the suit, shivering as you touch the red jelly. Knowing it’s best to get it over with quickly, you pull the baggy-suit up and close the belt before pressing the button on its buckle. The suit swiftly comes to life, the hardlight projectors on the back making the rest of a naga body sprout from nothing behind you. At the same time, you lose all sensation from your lower body as the suit rewrites your senses with its own. You brace yourself against the nausea caused by the sudden transformation of your limbs and the change in balance it brings, but find that the ordeal is soon over. You look behind you with satisfaction, admiring the scale-covered body of a naga slithering there. You pat your body, noting with satisfaction that your hand touched what felt like a real naleen body and that your own flank felt your hand’s touch as well. You also feel your [pc.crotch] back there, where it belongs. At least, a hardlight copy that rests on your waist where it belongs. You’re a naga now! ...unless you take off the suit."])))

blockHeader("Unequipping the Hardlight Naga Suit...")+textify(n||(n=(0,i.Z)(["You press the button on your belt buckle and brace yourself. Your naga body starts slowly losing its opacity at the same rate as you lose sensation in it. Soon enough, your entire hardlight body is gone, the loss of sensation giving you a nauseating feeling which you cannot focus on as you already have to deal with a drastically different center of gravity. Once you recover, you take a deep breath and pull the suit’s bag-like brim down, freeing your regular ",". You shiver as you feel them properly once more and stow the suit away. You’re no longer a naga!"])),window.hardlightNagaSuitStorage.legOrLegs())
